Generated Narrative: CodeSystem artemis-mission-cs

Properties

This code system defines the following properties for its concepts

NameCodeURITypeDescription
statusstatushttp://hl7.org/fhir/uv/aerospace/CodeSystem/artemis-mission-cs#statuscodeMission status (completed, in-progress, planned)
targettargethttp://hl7.org/fhir/uv/aerospace/CodeSystem/artemis-mission-cs#targetstringTarget destination (orbit or landing)
launchDatelaunchDatehttp://hl7.org/fhir/uv/aerospace/CodeSystem/artemis-mission-cs#launchDatedateTimeLaunch date of mission (actual or planned)

Concepts

This case-sensitive code system http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/aerospace/CodeSystem/artemis-mission-cs defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinitionstatustargetlaunchDate
ARTEMIS-I Artemis IUncrewed test flight of Orion and SLS around the Moon. Launched Nov 16, 2022. Status: completed. Target: Lunar orbit and return.completedLunar orbit and return (uncrewed test)2022-11-16T06:47:00Z
ARTEMIS-II Artemis IIFirst crewed lunar flyby mission of Artemis program. Planned ~2026. Status: planned. Target: Lunar flyby (crewed).plannedLunar flyby (crewed)2026-09-01T00:00:00Z
ARTEMIS-III Artemis IIICrewed low-Earth orbit test flight preparing systems for future lunar landings. Planned ~2027. Status: planned. Target: LEO test flight (crewed).plannedLEO test flight (crewed)2027-09-01T00:00:00Z
ARTEMIS-IV Artemis IVLunar Gateway assembly mission with landing. Planned ~2028. Status: planned. Target: Gateway assembly + landing.plannedLunar Gateway assembly + landing2028-09-01T00:00:00Z
ARTEMIS-V Artemis VLunar landing with new lander and Lunar Terrain Vehicle. Planned ~2030. Status: planned. Target: Lunar landing (new lander, LTV rover).plannedLunar landing (new lander, LTV rover)2030-01-01T00:00:00Z

name: ArtemisMissionCS
title: Artemis Missions
description: Historical and planned Artemis program missions with target destinations, launch dates, and status

property.description: Launch date of mission (actual or planned)

concept.definition: Uncrewed test flight of Orion and SLS around the Moon. Launched Nov 16, 2022. Status: completed. Target: Lunar orbit and return.

designation.value: Status: completed | Target: Lunar orbit and return (uncrewed test) | Launch: 2022-11-16

concept.definition: First crewed lunar flyby mission of Artemis program. Planned ~2026. Status: planned. Target: Lunar flyby (crewed).

designation.value: Status: planned | Target: Lunar flyby (crewed) | Launch: ~2026

concept.definition: Crewed low-Earth orbit test flight preparing systems for future lunar landings. Planned ~2027. Status: planned. Target: LEO test flight (crewed).

designation.value: Status: planned | Target: LEO test flight (crewed) | Launch: ~2027

concept.definition: Lunar Gateway assembly mission with landing. Planned ~2028. Status: planned. Target: Gateway assembly + landing.

designation.value: Status: planned | Target: Lunar Gateway assembly + landing | Launch: ~2028

concept.definition: Lunar landing with new lander and Lunar Terrain Vehicle. Planned ~2030. Status: planned. Target: Lunar landing (new lander, LTV rover).

designation.value: Status: planned | Target: Lunar landing (new lander, LTV rover) | Launch: ~2030
